entry.title: Audisi Stand Up Barry: Gerakan Ibu-ibu Naik Matic Itu Kayak Kecoa Terbang - SUCI 5

link.title: Audisi Stand Up Barry: Gerakan Ibu-ibu Naik Matic Itu Kayak Kecoa Terbang - SUCI 5

entry.content:
BANDUNG, KOMPAS.TV - Inilah peserta audisi Stand Up Comedy Indonesia season 5 (SUCI 5), Barry asal Bekasi. Barry ini merupakan seorang anak motor.
Materi yang dibawakan pun tak jauh-jauh soal motor. Seperti apa? Yuk nonton videonya!
——————————————————————————————————————-
SUCI 9 akan kembali lagi untuk menemani para pecinta setia Stand Up Comedy Indonesia, setelah vakum selama 1 tahun.
Sambil menunggu hadirnya SUCI 9 di layar kaca, tim KompasTV akan menampilkan kembali video-video yang menarik sekaligus mengundang tawa para penonton Stand Up Comedy.
SUCI akan bernostalgia melalui tayangan video dari SUCI 1 sampai SUCI 8.
Tentunya dengan penampilan dari komika-komika ternama, yang pada waktu itu sedang merintis karier mereka.
Untuk para pecinta SUCI yang mau request upload, silakan tinggalkan komen di bawah ya.
Follow Stand Up Comedy KompasTV di Instagram: @sucikompastv untuk tahu informasi-informasi terupdate Stand Up Comedy Kompas TV, termasuk jadwal audisi.
#Audisi #StandUpComedy #SUCI5
entry.summary: BANDUNG, KOMPAS.TV - Inilah peserta audisi Stand Up Comedy Indonesia season 5 (SUCI 5), Barry asal Bekasi. Barry ini merupakan seorang anak motor. Materi yang dibawakan pun tak jauh-jauh soal motor. Seperti apa? Yuk nonton videonya! ——————————————————————————————————————- SUCI 9 akan kembali lagi untuk menemani para pecinta setia Stand Up Comedy Indonesia, setelah vakum selama 1 tahun. Sambil menunggu hadirnya SUCI 9 di layar kaca, tim KompasTV akan menampilkan kembali video-video yang menarik sekaligus mengundang tawa para penonton Stand Up Comedy. SUCI akan bernostalgia melalui tayangan video dari SUCI 1 sampai SUCI 8. Tentunya dengan penampilan dari komika-komika ternama, yang pada waktu itu sedang merintis karier mereka. Untuk para pecinta SUCI yang mau request upload, silakan tinggalkan komen di bawah ya. Follow Stand Up Comedy KompasTV di Instagram: @sucikompastv untuk tahu informasi-informasi terupdate Stand Up Comedy Kompas TV, termasuk jadwal audisi. #Audisi #StandUpComedy #SUCI5

entry.title: Bannerghatta Park ಆನೆಗೆ ಪ್ರಸಿದ್ಧ ಹೆಸರು Oneindia Kannada

link.title: Bannerghatta Park ಆನೆಗೆ ಪ್ರಸಿದ್ಧ ಹೆಸರು Oneindia Kannada

entry.content:
ಬೆಂಗಳೂರಿನ ಹೊರವಲಯದಲ್ಲಿರುವ ಬನ್ನೇರುಘಟ್ಟ ಜೈವಿಕ ಉದ್ಯಾನದ ಮಸಾಲೆ ಪದಾರ್ಥವನ್ನು ಕರೋನಾ ಬಿಟ್ಟುಕೊಡುತ್ತಿದೆ. ಇತ್ತೀಚೆಗೆ, ಉದ್ಯಾನವನದಿಂದ ಕೇವಲ ಎರಡು ತಿಂಗಳು ದೂರದಲ್ಲಿ, ಅವಳು ಮುದ್ದಾದ ಮರಿಗಳಿಗೆ ಜನ್ಮ ನೀಡಿದಳು. ಎರಡು ಮರಿಗಳು ಆರೋಗ್ಯಕರವಾಗಿದ್ದವು ಮತ್ತು ಹೊಸ ಕಳೆಗಳನ್ನು ಉದ್ಯಾನವನಕ್ಕೆ ತಂದವು, ಅದು ಪ್ರವಾಸಿಗರಿಂದ ದೂರವಿತ್ತು.
#infosys #SudhaMurthy #Bannerghatta
The corona is giving up on the spice of Bannerghatta Biological Park on the outskirts of Bangalore. Recently, just two months away from the park, she gave birth to cute pups. The two chicks were healthy and brought new weeds to the park, which was devoid of tourists.
entry.summary: ಬೆಂಗಳೂರಿನ ಹೊರವಲಯದಲ್ಲಿರುವ ಬನ್ನೇರುಘಟ್ಟ ಜೈವಿಕ ಉದ್ಯಾನದ ಮಸಾಲೆ ಪದಾರ್ಥವನ್ನು ಕರೋನಾ ಬಿಟ್ಟುಕೊಡುತ್ತಿದೆ. ಇತ್ತೀಚೆಗೆ, ಉದ್ಯಾನವನದಿಂದ ಕೇವಲ ಎರಡು ತಿಂಗಳು ದೂರದಲ್ಲಿ, ಅವಳು ಮುದ್ದಾದ ಮರಿಗಳಿಗೆ ಜನ್ಮ ನೀಡಿದಳು. ಎರಡು ಮರಿಗಳು ಆರೋಗ್ಯಕರವಾಗಿದ್ದವು ಮತ್ತು ಹೊಸ ಕಳೆಗಳನ್ನು ಉದ್ಯಾನವನಕ್ಕೆ ತಂದವು, ಅದು ಪ್ರವಾಸಿಗರಿಂದ ದೂರವಿತ್ತು. #infosys #SudhaMurthy #Bannerghatta The corona is giving up on the spice of Bannerghatta Biological Park on the outskirts of Bangalore. Recently, just two months away from the park, she gave birth to cute pups. The two chicks were healthy and brought new weeds to the park, which was devoid of tourists.

entry.title: India has ‘military options’ if talks fail: General Bipin Rawat on China

link.title: India has ‘military options’ if talks fail: General Bipin Rawat on China

entry.content: As diplomatic talks between India and China over the issue of transgressions have failed to yield any significant results, Chief of Defence Staff (CDS) General Bipin Rawat on Monday stated that India has "military options" to deal with China if talks fail
entry.summary: As diplomatic talks between India and China over the issue of transgressions have failed to yield any significant results, Chief of Defence Staff (CDS) General Bipin Rawat on Monday stated that India has "military options" to deal with China if talks fail

entry.title: Frédéric Worms : ‘Certains ont inventé le terme de ‘cancel culture’ pour dire qu’il y aurait une ‘culture globale’ qui serait criminelle, qu’il faudrait envoyer promener, et en voir partout les traces.’

link.title: Frédéric Worms : ‘Certains ont inventé le terme de ‘cancel culture’ pour dire qu’il y aurait une ‘culture globale’ qui serait criminelle, qu’il faudrait envoyer promener, et en voir partout les traces.’

entry.content:
Frédéric Worms, philosophe, auteur de Sidération et Résistance (Desclée de Brouwer) est l’invité du Grand entretien.
Plus d’info:
entry.summary: Frédéric Worms, philosophe, auteur de Sidération et Résistance (Desclée de Brouwer) est l’invité du Grand entretien. Plus d’info:

entry.title: Prime Minister Modi writes letter to Suresh Raina on his retirement after MS Dhoni वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Prime Minister Modi writes letter to Suresh Raina on his retirement after MS Dhoni वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Prime Minister Narendra Modi has also penned down a tribute for retiring Indian cricketer Suresh Raina who joined MS Dhoni into retirement on August 15.Modi lauded Raina’s contribution to Indian cricket and said he was too young to retire. Lauding Raina, who was one of the finest fielders of his generation.
भारतीय क्रिकेट टीम के पूर्व कप्तान महेंद्र सिंह धौनी को गुरुवार को देश के प्रधानमंत्री नरेंद्र मोदी द्वारा लिखा गया पत्र रिटायरमेंट के बाद मिला था। पीएम मोदी ने उस चिट्ठी में धौनी की तारीफ की थी और उनको नए भारत का उदाहरण बताया था। इसके बाद अब भारतीय टीम के पूर्व क्रिकेटर सुरेश रैना को भी पीएम मोदी से एक पत्र मिला है, क्योंकि धौनी के साथ सुरेश रैना ने भी इंटरनेशनल क्रिकेट को अलविदा कह दिया था।
#PrimeMinisterModi #SureshRaina #PMlettertoRaina
entry.summary: Prime Minister Narendra Modi has also penned down a tribute for retiring Indian cricketer Suresh Raina who joined MS Dhoni into retirement on August 15.Modi lauded Raina’s contribution to Indian cricket and said he was too young to retire. Lauding Raina, who was one of the finest fielders of his generation. भारतीय क्रिकेट टीम के पूर्व कप्तान महेंद्र सिंह धौनी को गुरुवार को देश के प्रधानमंत्री नरेंद्र मोदी द्वारा लिखा गया पत्र रिटायरमेंट के बाद मिला था। पीएम मोदी ने उस चिट्ठी में धौनी की तारीफ की थी और उनको नए भारत का उदाहरण बताया था। इसके बाद अब भारतीय टीम के पूर्व क्रिकेटर सुरेश रैना को भी पीएम मोदी से एक पत्र मिला है, क्योंकि धौनी के साथ सुरेश रैना ने भी इंटरनेशनल क्रिकेट को अलविदा कह दिया था। #PrimeMinisterModi #SureshRaina #PMlettertoRaina

entry.title: Leadership crisis haunts Congress

link.title: Leadership crisis haunts Congress

entry.content:
India Today’s special show The Long Story gives you an insight into the leadership crisis that is haunting the Indian National Congress.
According to sources, Rahul Gandhi was reluctant to return as the Congress president till the time he could not “cleanse” the party of leaders, mostly the old generation, he was not particularly fond of.
The plan was supposed to be executed after August 10 when Sonia Gandhi completed a year since she took charge as the party president following Rahul’s resignation last year.
Watch as we take a look into the history of Congress Presidency, Sonia Gandhi’s phenomenal rise in politics and more.
entry.summary: India Today’s special show The Long Story gives you an insight into the leadership crisis that is haunting the Indian National Congress. According to sources, Rahul Gandhi was reluctant to return as the Congress president till the time he could not “cleanse” the party of leaders, mostly the old generation, he was not particularly fond of. The plan was supposed to be executed after August 10 when Sonia Gandhi completed a year since she took charge as the party president following Rahul’s resignation last year. Watch as we take a look into the history of Congress Presidency, Sonia Gandhi’s phenomenal rise in politics and more.

entry.title: Le Danemark va financer les retraites en taxant les ultrariches

link.title: Le Danemark va financer les retraites en taxant les ultrariches

entry.content: Il y a comme un petit air de révolution au royaume du Danemark. Un peu plus d’un an après qu’elle est devenue Première ministre, la leader de la Social-démocratie, Mette Frederiksen, prépare une réforme de très grande ampleur, raconte Bloomberg. Elle veut en effet lever de nouveaux impôts, à hauteur de 400 millions d’euros, pour financer une réforme des retraites destinée à permettre le départ des salariés ayant des conditions de travail particulièrement difficiles.
entry.summary: Il y a comme un petit air de révolution au royaume du Danemark. Un peu plus d’un an après qu’elle est devenue Première ministre, la leader de la Social-démocratie, Mette Frederiksen, prépare une réforme de très grande ampleur, raconte Bloomberg. Elle veut en effet lever de nouveaux impôts, à hauteur de 400 millions d’euros, pour financer une réforme des retraites destinée à permettre le départ des salariés ayant des conditions de travail particulièrement difficiles.

entry.title: Affaire Josef Chovanec: le cabinet de Jan Jambon a été mis au courant en juillet 20184

link.title: Affaire Josef Chovanec: le cabinet de Jan Jambon a été mis au courant en juillet 20184

entry.content:
Affaire Josef Chovanec: le cabinet de Jan Jambon a été mis au courant en juillet 20184
Le ministre de l’Intérieur et du Commerce extérieur, Pieter De Crem, s’entretient en néerlandais lors d’une session
de la commission de la justice du parlement fédéral à Bruxelles
entry.summary: Affaire Josef Chovanec: le cabinet de Jan Jambon a été mis au courant en juillet 20184 Le ministre de l’Intérieur et du Commerce extérieur, Pieter De Crem, s’entretient en néerlandais lors d’une session de la commission de la justice du parlement fédéral à Bruxelles

entry.title: Cartes sur table Pourquoi la Grèce et la Turquie se déchirent en Méditerranée

link.title: Cartes sur table Pourquoi la Grèce et la Turquie se déchirent en Méditerranée

entry.content:
La Turquie a envoyé le 10 août un navire de recherche sismique, l’Oruç Reis, dans les eaux territoriales grecques. Accompagné d’une flottille militaire, ce navire turque navigue à quelques mille nautiques d’importants gisements d’hydrocarbures récemment découverts par des compagnies pétrolières. Si la recherche de ressources motive probablement l’incursion turque, elle ravive aussi un conflit épineux entre les deux États. Explications en cartes animées.
Consultez notre site:
Suivez-nous sur YouTube :
Découvrez notre Atlas de l’Eau, actuellement en vente :
entry.summary: La Turquie a envoyé le 10 août un navire de recherche sismique, l’Oruç Reis, dans les eaux territoriales grecques. Accompagné d’une flottille militaire, ce navire turque navigue à quelques mille nautiques d’importants gisements d’hydrocarbures récemment découverts par des compagnies pétrolières. Si la recherche de ressources motive probablement l’incursion turque, elle ravive aussi un conflit épineux entre les deux États. Explications en cartes animées. Consultez notre site: Suivez-nous sur YouTube : Découvrez notre Atlas de l’Eau, actuellement en vente :

entry.title: Istres : un incendie détruit 500 hectares de végétation

link.title: Istres : un incendie détruit 500 hectares de végétation

entry.content:
À cause de la chaleur associée au vent, 500 hectares de végétation ont été détruits par les flammes à Istres et ses environs (Bouches-du-Rhône). Les pompiers ont lutté toute la nuit pour vaincre l’incendie mardi 25 août.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: À cause de la chaleur associée au vent, 500 hectares de végétation ont été détruits par les flammes à Istres et ses environs (Bouches-du-Rhône). Les pompiers ont lutté toute la nuit pour vaincre l’incendie mardi 25 août. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: Zack Snyder’s Justice League Teaser Trailer #1 (2021) Amber Heard, Henry Cavill Action Movie HD

link.title: Zack Snyder’s Justice League Teaser Trailer #1 (2021) Amber Heard, Henry Cavill Action Movie HD

entry.content:
Teaser Trailer for Zack Snyder’s Justice League, starring Amber Heard, Henry Cavill, Amy Adams, Ben Affleck and Jason Momoa. Film will premiere to the premium network HBO Max.
Fueled by his restored faith in humanity and inspired by Superman’s selfless act, Bruce Wayne enlists the help of his newfound ally, Diana Prince, to face an even greater enemy. Together, Batman and Wonder Woman work quickly to find and recruit a team of metahumans to stand against this newly awakened threat. But despite the formation of this unprecedented league of heroes-Batman, Wonder Woman, Aquaman, Cyborg and The Flash-it may already be too late to save the planet from an assault of catastrophic proportions.
entry.summary: Teaser Trailer for Zack Snyder’s Justice League, starring Amber Heard, Henry Cavill, Amy Adams, Ben Affleck and Jason Momoa. Film will premiere to the premium network HBO Max. Fueled by his restored faith in humanity and inspired by Superman’s selfless act, Bruce Wayne enlists the help of his newfound ally, Diana Prince, to face an even greater enemy. Together, Batman and Wonder Woman work quickly to find and recruit a team of metahumans to stand against this newly awakened threat. But despite the formation of this unprecedented league of heroes-Batman, Wonder Woman, Aquaman, Cyborg and The Flash-it may already be too late to save the planet from an assault of catastrophic proportions.

entry.title: A Chef’s Search for the Spicy Flavors of His Ancestors

link.title: A Chef’s Search for the Spicy Flavors of His Ancestors

entry.content:
Who influenced the flavors you love today? For chef Zhou Yongle, it was his grandmother.
In this video, Zhou traces his roots to China’s Hunan Province and rediscovers the spicy flavors of his ancestors.
If you liked this video, we have more stories about Hunan’s famously spicy food, including:
How New York’s Hunan Slurp Makes Its $30 Noodle Soup
This Spicy Pork Rib Dish Has a Love Story Behind It
Footage: Youku 云集将来
Script: Tiffany Ip
Narration: Dai Qian
Editor: Nicholas Ko
Mastering: Victor Peña
Music: Audio Network
entry.summary: Who influenced the flavors you love today? For chef Zhou Yongle, it was his grandmother. In this video, Zhou traces his roots to China’s Hunan Province and rediscovers the spicy flavors of his ancestors. If you liked this video, we have more stories about Hunan’s famously spicy food, including: How New York’s Hunan Slurp Makes Its $30 Noodle Soup This Spicy Pork Rib Dish Has a Love Story Behind It Footage: Youku 云集将来 Script: Tiffany Ip Narration: Dai Qian Editor: Nicholas Ko Mastering: Victor Peña Music: Audio Network

entry.title: 2020 Arch Motorcycle KRGT-1 First Ride

link.title: 2020 Arch Motorcycle KRGT-1 First Ride

entry.content: A first ride on the 2020 Arch KRGT-1 whose major suspension, ergonomic, and braking upgrades make for a performance cruiser that actually lives up to the hype.
entry.summary: A first ride on the 2020 Arch KRGT-1 whose major suspension, ergonomic, and braking upgrades make for a performance cruiser that actually lives up to the hype.

entry.title: Pulwama Terror Attack: NIA names Masood Azhar and his brother as plotters in the chargesheet

link.title: Pulwama Terror Attack: NIA names Masood Azhar and his brother as plotters in the chargesheet

entry.content: Pakistan-based terror mastermind Masood Azhar and his brother Rauf Asghar have been named as the key conspirators behind the 2019 Pulwama terror attack in a charge-sheet filed today by the National Investigation Agency. The charge-sheet names 19 accused and details how the planning and execution of the attack in Kashmir was done from Pakistan. According to the NIA Six of the terrorists named by the NIA were eliminated, seven have been arrested and five are still missing of which three are Pakistanis. Over 40 soldiers were killed when a suicide bomber rammed a car full of explosives into a security convoy at Pulwama on February 14 last year.
entry.summary: Pakistan-based terror mastermind Masood Azhar and his brother Rauf Asghar have been named as the key conspirators behind the 2019 Pulwama terror attack in a charge-sheet filed today by the National Investigation Agency. The charge-sheet names 19 accused and details how the planning and execution of the attack in Kashmir was done from Pakistan. According to the NIA Six of the terrorists named by the NIA were eliminated, seven have been arrested and five are still missing of which three are Pakistanis. Over 40 soldiers were killed when a suicide bomber rammed a car full of explosives into a security convoy at Pulwama on February 14 last year.

entry.title: Transferts - Pirlo : ‘Dybala n’a jamais été sur le marché’

link.title: Transferts - Pirlo : ‘Dybala n’a jamais été sur le marché’

entry.content: Andrea Pirlo, nouvel entraîneur de la Juventus, a déclaré avoir parlé à Cristiano Ronaldo, certain que la star du Portugal allait rester à Turin. Pirlo a également assuré qu’il comptait sur Paulo Dybala, qui selon lui ne figure pas sur la liste des potentiels partants.
entry.summary: Andrea Pirlo, nouvel entraîneur de la Juventus, a déclaré avoir parlé à Cristiano Ronaldo, certain que la star du Portugal allait rester à Turin. Pirlo a également assuré qu’il comptait sur Paulo Dybala, qui selon lui ne figure pas sur la liste des potentiels partants.

entry.title: Inside Ariana Grande’s VMAs Rehearsal, Beyoncé’s ‘Brown Skin Girl’ Visual & More Billboard News

link.title: Inside Ariana Grande’s VMAs Rehearsal, Beyoncé’s ‘Brown Skin Girl’ Visual & More Billboard News

entry.content: Ariana Grande gears up for the 2020 VMAs, Roddy Rich falls out of the PUSH Best New Artist category after conveniently dropping out of the show and Beyoncé’s “Brown Skin Girl” visual can finally be seen outside of ‘Black Is King.’
entry.summary: Ariana Grande gears up for the 2020 VMAs, Roddy Rich falls out of the PUSH Best New Artist category after conveniently dropping out of the show and Beyoncé’s “Brown Skin Girl” visual can finally be seen outside of ‘Black Is King.’

entry.title: Miss France : l’exclusion d’une candidate en Guadeloupe fait jaser

link.title: Miss France : l’exclusion d’une candidate en Guadeloupe fait jaser

entry.content:
Anaëlle Guimbi voulait participer au concours miss Guadeloupe vendredi 21 août. La lutte contre le cancer lui tient à cœur. Elle l’a défendue en posant dénudée, ce qui lui a valu sa disqualification.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: Anaëlle Guimbi voulait participer au concours miss Guadeloupe vendredi 21 août. La lutte contre le cancer lui tient à cœur. Elle l’a défendue en posant dénudée, ce qui lui a valu sa disqualification. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: #TDF2020 - Discover the entire route

link.title: #TDF2020 - Discover the entire route

entry.content:
We had to wait a little bit longer than usual, but Le Tour is finally here!
See you in Nice in a week’s time for the #TDF2020 Grand Départ!
Plus d’informations sur / More information on:
Hashtag officiel / Official Hashtag: #TDF2020
